name: Buffer
description: Manage Buffer (social media scheduling: channels, posts, idea queue, analytics) from any AI agent via GraphQL. 8 tools, Bearer token.
instructions:
This connector wraps the Buffer Publish GraphQL API (graphql.buffer.com).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in at https://publish.buffer.com → top-right avatar → **Settings → API access → Generate personal access token**.
2. Set `BUFFER_ACCESS_TOKEN`.

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${BUFFER_ACCESS_TOKEN}`.

**GraphQL-only**: Buffer's modern API is GraphQL. The auto-injected `buffer_graphql_query` / `buffer_graphql_mutation` / `buffer_graphql_schema` builtins cover anything not in the typed wrappers below.

**Channel = connected social account** (Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, Mastodon, TikTok, Pinterest, YouTube, Bluesky, Threads). Each has an ID; posts must specify channelId(s).

**Post status**: `PENDING_APPROVAL`, `SCHEDULED`, `SENT`, `FAILED`, `DRAFT`.

**Rate limits**: 60 req/min per token. 429 with `Retry-After`.

**Out of scope here**: organization/team membership, billing, Pablo image editor, the Analyze (analytics) deep reports.

tools.name: buffer_current_user
tools.description: Return the authenticated user with their orgs.

endpointMapping.path: { currentUser { id email name organizations { id name } } }

tools.name: buffer_list_channels
tools.description: List connected social channels for an organization.

endpointMapping.path: query ListChannels($orgId: ID!) { organization(id: $orgId) { channels { id name service serviceType timezone avatar } } }

tools.name: buffer_list_posts
tools.description: List posts on a channel with status filter.

endpointMapping.path: query ListPosts($channelId: ID!, $status: PostStatus, $first: Int, $after: String) { channel(id: $channelId) { posts(status: $status, first: $first, after: $after) { edges { node { id status text dueAt sentAt sentLink media { url type } } } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } } }

tools.name: buffer_create_post
tools.description: Schedule or save a draft post on one or more channels.

due_at.description: ISO 8601 schedule time. Omit for queue / draft.

save_as_draft.description: If true, save as draft instead of scheduling.

endpointMapping.path: mutation Create($input: CreatePostInput!) { createPost(input: $input) { post { id status } } }

tools.name: buffer_update_post
tools.description: Update a scheduled post's text, schedule, or media.

endpointMapping.path: mutation Update($input: UpdatePostInput!) { updatePost(input: $input) { post { id status dueAt } } }

tools.name: buffer_send_now
tools.description: Send a scheduled post immediately, regardless of due_at.

endpointMapping.path: mutation SendNow($id: ID!) { sendPostNow(id: $id) { post { id status sentAt } } }

tools.name: buffer_list_ideas
tools.description: List ideas from the org-wide idea queue.

endpointMapping.path: query Ideas($orgId: ID!, $first: Int) { organization(id: $orgId) { ideas(first: $first) { edges { node { id text createdAt } } } } }
